note: Per-family skill->spec map for the FlowMCP Best-Practice Specification. FlowMCP implementer skills are PRIVATE (F9=A, Memo 060 Z5-14): the public spec repo carries spec + build-plan only, so this map is intentionally empty (0 implementers). It exists so the family is symmetric with the meta-spec map layer and the bridge renders an honest "nothing published here" projection.
